e , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class StringCompare extends TypedAtomicActor Compare two strings specified either as inputs or parameters. The output is either true or false, depending on

he output is either true or false, depending on whether the comparison function is satisfied. The comparison functions are: equals : Output true if the strings are equal (Default). startsWith : Output true if firstString starts with secondStrin

Output true if firstString starts with secondString . endsWith : Output true if firstString ends with secondString . contains : Output true if firstString contains secondString . The strings to be compared will be taken from the inputs if they are

pared will be taken from the inputs if they are available, and otherwise will be taken from the corresponding parameters. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: StringCompare.java,v 1.11 2004/04/13 03:10:11 cxh Exp $ Author: Vinay Krishnan, Daniel Lá
